title: Create / Print a form that has data from Monday columns or export to PDF
excerpt: We have a furniture manufacturing company and the orders are entered into monday.com. Is there a way to easily setup a way to print the order information from certain columns that contain that information? Writing out al…

posts.author: MFeldballe (Matt Feldballe)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a furniture manufacturing company and the orders are entered into monday.com. Is there a way to easily setup a way to print the order information from certain columns that contain that information? Writing out all of the information manually on a build form is very time consuming. It’d be great if there was a way to just export the relevant information to a separate page to give to the production team. Is this possible?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MFeldballe - how you looked into DocuGen? You can use this to create word/PDF documents on the fly based on data in your boards.

We have used it for a variety of functions for a number of clients. There is also a free plan that gives you a decent number of generations per month.

Hope this helps!
Mark
